'''Aemont Sillib''' was a [[Muun/Legends|Muun]] that served the [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|InterGalactic Banking Clan]] as a loan officer during the early years of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]. He worked diligently to change his position in the social and economic hierarchy of [[Muunilinst/Legends|Muunilinst]]. Born into a low-level clan, Sillib was first employed to oversee a south polar [[mine-spire]]. His skills with diplomacy and tact earned him regular promotions, until he was named a loan officer and assigned an office in [[Harnaidan]]. Sillib hoped one day to become chairman of the IGBC and was determined to make this dream a reality.
